connection_type.title: Intellipool – connection type
connection_type.description:
Choose how to connect.

• Cloud (intellipool.eu) – most values, recommended for INTP-1010B
• Official API (domotique-piscine.eu) – fewer values but reliable
• Local – only for devices with an open web server (not INTP-1010B)

scan.title: Network scan
scan.description: Found {count} candidate device(s) on the network. Select your Intellipool or enter the IP manually.

local.title: Local connection
local.description: Enter the IP address of your Intellipool INTP-1010B. The integration will probe common API endpoints automatically.

cloud.title: Cloud connection (intellipool.eu)
cloud.description: Use your intellipool.eu login credentials. The official-API fields are optional and enable a failsafe – if the scrape stops updating, data is fetched from the official API instead.

official.title: Official API (domotique-piscine.eu)
official.description: Enter the installation ID and API key. Find them in your REST URL: /api/install/<installation-ID>/probe/...?key=<API-key>.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect. Check the IP address and network.
error.endpoint_not_found: No local API found on the device. See README for protocol discovery instructions.
error.no_serial: Login OK but the pool serial could not be auto-detected. Enter it manually (the number in displaySummary('...') on intellipool.eu).
error.bad_failsafe: Failsafe: the API key or installation ID is wrong. Leave both blank if you don't want a failsafe.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check logs for details.

data.stale_minutes: Failsafe: switch to official API after (minutes without update)
